overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking through a scenic mountain valley. The character traverses grassy meadows and rocky riverbanks before stopping at the water's edge to overlook a flowing river with a distant waterfall.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an open grassy meadow toward a large rock formation

entered.detail: large prominent rock formation with steep cliffs serving as the main landmark ahead
wooden railway bridge spanning across the upper right portion of the valley
green pine trees dotting the meadow landscape
open field of tall green grass with a dirt path running through it

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit grassy meadow surrounded by scattered pine trees. A prominent tall rock butte dominates the center horizon while a wooden trestle bridge is visible in the distant right background.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river approach with rocky terrain

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy meadow to rocky dirt as the river comes into view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along a narrowing path toward the river, moving into the shadow of the cliff

entered.detail: wide river with turquoise water flowing through the valley
rocky shoreline with boulders and sparse vegetation replacing the grassy meadow
steep rock face rising on the left side creating a canyon-like enclosure

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to rocky ground as the character approaches the riverbank. The grassy meadow gives way to boulders and dirt, with a steep cliff wall rising on the left and the turquoise river visible to the right. The wooden bridge disappears from view behind the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with flowing water and waterfall vista

events.description: character slows and stops on a rocky outcrop at the river's edge
distant waterfall becomes visible through the mist downstream as the camera pans slightly

agents.ego_description: standing on the rocky outcrop overlooking the turbulent river, observing the flowing water and distant waterfall

entered.detail: waterfall cascading down the distant canyon wall visible through river mist
white water rapids flowing around rocks in the river

segments.scene_description: The character stops on a rocky outcrop at the river's edge, overlooking the turbulent turquoise water. The scene is enclosed by canyon walls with a distant waterfall becoming visible through the mist. The camera pans slightly to take in the sweeping view of the river flowing through the rocky valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit meadow into the enclosed depths of a rocky river canyon. It begins with the character walking through grassy fields dotted with pine trees, with a tall rock butte dominating the horizon and a wooden trestle bridge visible in the distance. As the character advances, the soft meadow gives way to a rugged terrain of boulders and dirt, while a steep cliff wall rises on the left and the wooden bridge disappears behind the landscape. The scene then shifts to the river's edge as the character stops on a rocky outcrop overlooking turbulent turquoise water. Finally, the camera pans across the sweeping valley, revealing a distant waterfall emerging through the mist between the towering canyon walls.
